pr.title: Record: PROTEUS v7 — 11L INT6 + LoRA TTT (mean val_bpb=0.9512, 3 seeds)

output.summary: 11-layer INT6 quantized transformer uses depth-scaled residuals plus backward-looking multi-epoch LoRA TTT for stable evaluation adaptation.
output.valOnlyReasoning: LoRA weights are trained per validation document during multi-epoch test-time training, so adaptation occurs solely on the validation shards.
techniques: INT6 uniform quantization across weight matrices
